name: Freshwater Church
description: Freshwater Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Paw Paw, MI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, trainers or lessons, water, and restrooms.

name: Lake Arvesta Sports Complex
description: Lake Arvesta Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in South Haven, MI. There are 12 concrete courts. 3 are indoors and 9 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $10 required for day access

name: Paw Paw Senior Center
description: Paw Paw Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Paw Paw, MI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Performance Field House
description: Come play pickleball at Performance Field House in Paw Paw, MI! There are 6 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Quadrant VII - Bangers Barn
description: Come play pickleball at Quadrant VII - Bangers Barn in Mattawan, MI! The court surface is concrete. You'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include food, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Senior Services of Van Buren Couny
description: Come play pickleball at Senior Services of Van Buren Couny in South Haven, MI! There are 3 indoor concrete and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.

name: South Haven High School
description: Come play pickleball at South Haven High School in South Haven, MI! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.
